additional_rules.description: GMCC Celebrity Community Opportunity Mortgage — CRA-based primary purchase program with up to 100% financing (no MI) in eligible counties across CA, FL, GA, MA, NC (all), SC (all), and VA. Pilot program, restricted submission.
additional_rules.conforming: Max $806,500 | 100% LTV / 105% CLTV (min FICO 660) or 97% LTV / 100% CLTV (min FICO 640)
additional_rules.high_balance: Max $1,209,750 | 95% LTV / 105% CLTV (min FICO 680) or 80% LTV / 100% CLTV (min FICO 640)
additional_rules.income_limit_100_mfi: Base path: all eligible counties. Borrower income ≤100% MFI.
additional_rules.income_limit_150_mfi_fthb: First-Generation Homebuyer path: ≤150% MFI in all eligible counties.
additional_rules.income_limit_150_mfi_mmct_lmi: Property in MMCT or LMIT in CA, GA, MA, NC, SC only: ≤150% MFI (not available in VA or FL).
additional_rules.income_limit_200_mfi: First-Gen Homebuyer in MMCT or LMIT in CA, GA, MA, NC, SC only: ≤200% MFI (not available in VA or FL).
additional_rules.asset_limit: Post-close liquid assets must not exceed 36 months PITIA reserves
additional_rules.manufactured_homes: Eligible in NC, SC, VA only; max 95% LTV/CLTV in those states
additional_rules.no_current_property: Borrower may NOT hold ownership interest in another property at closing
additional_rules.secondary_financing: Down payment assistance / FLP allowed in CA, GA, MA, NC, SC only; external DPA allowed per FNMA; max CLTV 105%
additional_rules.gift_funds: Max 10% of sales price; may be used as reserves
additional_rules.no_nonoccupant_coborrower: Non-occupant co-borrowers and non-borrower title holders not allowed
additional_rules.first_gen_definition: Not owned home in last 3 years AND parent(s) never owned a home, OR borrower was in foster care

general_notes: GMCC Celebrity Community Opportunity Mortgage — CRA-based primary purchase program offering up to 100% financing with no MI.
Pilot program — restricted submission. Broker loan.
Eligible in CA (13 counties), FL (14 counties), GA (16 counties), MA (4 counties), NC (all 100 counties), SC (all 46 counties), VA (22 counties + 14 independent cities).
Purchase only. Owner-occupied primary residence only. Not limited to first-time homebuyers.
Borrower cannot hold ownership interest in any other property at closing.

Income limits: 100% MFI base; 150% MFI for First-Gen Homebuyers in all eligible areas or for MMCT/LMIT properties in CA/GA/MA/NC/SC; 200% MFI for First-Gen in MMCT/LMIT in CA/GA/MA/NC/SC. VA and FL cap at 100% MFI (150% for First-Gen only).
Standard Conforming max $806,500: 100% LTV / 105% CLTV at min FICO 660; 97% LTV / 100% CLTV at min FICO 640.
High Balance max $1,209,750: 95% LTV / 105% CLTV at min FICO 680; 80% LTV / 100% CLTV at min FICO 640.
Min 80% LTV. Min $500 borrower own funds. 2 months PITI reserves required.
Post-close liquid assets must not exceed 36 months PITIA — program is for borrowers who need the assistance.
Eligible property: SFR (1 unit), PUD, warrantable condo. New condo projects ineligible.
Manufactured homes eligible in NC, SC, VA only at max 95% LTV/CLTV.
No non-occupant co-borrowers. No non-borrower title holders.
All borrower income must be disclosed for income limit determination.
Down payment assistance (FLP) allowed in CA, GA, MA, NC, SC only; max CLTV 105% with external DPA.
